message.content:
@startuml
title Secure Map Reduce 2 – Shuffle Service Token Flow

participant "Client\n(c)" as c #LightBlue
participant "Resource Manager\n(rm)" as rm #Lavender
participant "Node Manager\n(nm)" as nm #MistyRose
participant "Shuffle Handler\n(ss)" as ss #Thistle
box Application Master Container red
    participant "" as am #Plum
end box
package Job Execution {
    rectangle ac [Application Container] #Red
}
rectangle t Task(t) #Orange
database fs File System(fs) #WhiteSmoke


== Bootstrap ==
c ->+ rm : createJob [...] ()\n1 job-id 
rm -->- c 

activate c
create token shfl_tkn_mk <<Token>>#YellowGreen
shfl_tkn_mk <-up-- c:createShuffleToken(shfl-tkn-mk)\n2 shfl-token  
destroy shfl_tkn_mk  

token ctokens<<Tokens>>#PinkSalmon
ctokens<-down-c:serializeTokens(\n3 (shfl_token,...)) \nc_tokens{shfl_token...}}   
deactivate c 


== Job Submission ==    
note over c,fs **bold**:submitApplicaton([...])\\4(job_id,c_tokens[shf_ltk_n],...) \\app_rpt[c_ln_tt_knn]}  


= Initiation =     
nm->>am:startContainer[...]\\\5((cc_tokns[s_h_fltt_nn]),svc_tokeens{s_fflltttn})      
ss-->ac:initAppl(jb_iid,sff_llttlkk)n6 exec        
aa<|---s_s_:exec7 startContaineer8 [...](sv_ctoknes(sfhlf_tlken)), ...)
